all.en: Welcome to the Emerging Leaders Seminar hosted by Crestwood Business Institute.
all.zh: 歡迎參加由 Crestwood 商業學院主辦的新興領導者研習營。

all.en: This five-day program is designed for mid-level managers across all industries.
all.zh: 本五天課程專為各產業的中階主管設計。

all.en: The seminar will run from Monday, May 11, through Friday, May 15.
all.zh: 研習營將自 5 月 11 日星期一至 5 月 15 日星期五舉行。

all.en: All sessions will be conducted at the Crestwood Executive Conference Center.
all.zh: 所有課程將於 Crestwood 高階經理人會議中心舉行。

all.en: Our curriculum combines classroom instruction with experiential learning activities.
all.zh: 課程結合課堂教學與體驗式學習活動。

all.en: Participants will be placed into cohorts of twelve for group discussions.
all.zh: 學員將分配至十二人一組進行小組討論。

all.en: Each cohort is guided by an executive coach with corporate leadership experience.
all.zh: 每組均由具備企業領導經驗的高階教練輔導。

all.en: Monday focuses on personal leadership style and emotional intelligence.
all.zh: 週一聚焦於個人領導風格與情緒智商。

all.en: Tuesday explores effective communication and conflict resolution techniques.
all.zh: 週二探討有效溝通與衝突化解技巧。

all.en: Wednesday covers strategic thinking, planning, and decision-making frameworks.
all.zh: 週三涵蓋策略思考、規劃及決策框架。

all.en: Thursday includes a half-day simulation on managing organizational change.
all.zh: 週四包括半天的組織變革管理模擬演練。

all.en: Friday concludes with a capstone presentation to a panel of senior executives.
all.zh: 週五以對資深主管小組進行總結報告作為結業。

all.en: Breakfast and lunch are provided daily in the dining hall.
all.zh: 每日於餐廳供應早餐與午餐。

all.en: An optional networking dinner is scheduled for Wednesday evening.
all.zh: 週三晚間另有自由參加的交流晚宴。

all.en: Participants will receive a printed workbook and access to digital resources.
all.zh: 學員將獲得實體講義並可使用數位學習資源。

all.en: Pre-reading materials must be completed before the first day of the program.
all.zh: 課前閱讀資料須於開課首日前完成。

all.en: A 360-degree feedback report will be reviewed during one-on-one coaching.
all.zh: 一對一輔導時將檢視 360 度回饋報告。

all.en: Dress code is business casual for all classroom sessions.
all.zh: 所有課堂活動服裝規範為商務休閒。

all.en: Tuition includes program fees, materials, and on-site catering.
all.zh: 學費涵蓋課程、教材與現場餐飲。

all.en: Accommodation can be arranged at our partner hotel for a discounted rate.
all.zh: 可協助安排合作飯店並享優惠房價。

all.en: Upon successful completion, participants will receive a certificate of achievement.
all.zh: 圓滿結業者將獲頒結業證書。

all.en: Alumni are invited to join our online network of more than three thousand graduates.
all.zh: 結業學員將獲邀加入逾三千名校友的線上人脈網絡。

all.en: Spaces are limited to forty-eight participants per cohort intake.
all.zh: 每梯次名額限額四十八人。

all.en: Please register at least three weeks before the program start date.
all.zh: 請於開課前至少三週完成報名。

all.en: We look forward to supporting your growth as an emerging business leader.
all.zh: 我們期待陪伴您在新興商業領導之路上持續成長。
